titleStmt.title: SII 18.190: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 190. (B.K. No. 106 of 1933-34.) MAIDŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab leaning against the front wall of the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 1104, Śubhakṛit, Mārgaśira śu. Pūrṇimā, Thursday, lunar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. This date is irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1182, November 12, Friday but there was no eclipse on that day, nor was there any saṁkramaṇa. It may be noted however that in the next month, i.e., Pushya there was a lunar eclipse on December 11, Saturday.

It records a grant of land made for the worship and offerings to god Kalidēva of Mūlasthāna by Kumāra Vīra-Vikramādityadēva (apparently Vikramāditya II of the Gutta family), Susaṅga-Daṇḍanāyaka and other residents of Guḍigēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷō
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya nānēkaśuṁbhaduba
poḷeva sīrmmu
tte sūsuttiralōraṁturbbi tuṁturppanigaḷasadaḷaṁ celvanāḷdattu kūrmmōddhurapāṭhī nādibhāsva
duguḷaguḷitagaḷadhvānaraudraṁ samudraṁ . varakūrmmēṁdraṁ sukaṁdaṁ phaṇipativimaḷō ttāḷanā
ḷaṁ diśāsiṁdhuramudyadugōtrabhūbhritukuḷadaḷanicayaṁ kēsaraṁ dēśabhāsvatupurasaṁ
dōhaṁ samaṁtuṁnatadivijanagaṁ karṇnikākāramaṁ tāḻdirejaṁbūdvīpavabujōdubhavaja
nitasarōjātaviṁtoppi tōrkkuṁ . piriduṁ madhyasthavā dvīpadoḷamaranagaṁ taṁnna gēndrakketen
kal bharatakṣētraṁ janānaṁdamanodavipudā kṣētradoḷu nāḍeyuṁ sauṁdaralakṣmī janumagē
haṁ nutabhuvanavadhūkuṁtaḷaṁ taṁnenalu vistarisirkkuṁ kuṁtaḷōrvvītaḷavakhiḷa sudhāRead tā
ḷaṁkritōdyaduviḷāsaṁ . Aṁtenipa kuṁtaḷōrvvīkāṁtege patiyenisi vairinripakuḷavi
ḷāyōgrāṁtakanesedaṁ dōrbbaḷakauṁtēyaṁ bijjaṇaṁ parākramabhīmaṁ . dhuradhīraṁ bijja
ḷōrvvīpatinutana tanūjātanudyaduvinūtōddhatatējaṁ puṇyapuṁjaṁgaḷacuryya
kuḷāṁbhōjasanumitranuduvrittara gaṁḍaṁ yuddhaśauṁḍaṁ sogayipanenasuṁ rāyanā rāya
ṇaṁ vistarakīrttiśrīviḷāsaṁ vasudheyoḷadaṭaṁdāhumallakṣitīśaṁ . nityakhiḷanāmāvaḷīvi
rājitarappa śrīmadāhavamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamireyuṁ tatupādapadumōpajīvigaḷumappa śrīma
numahamaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīravikramādityadēvarasara prabhāvōmṁnatiyaṁteṁda
ḍe . vri . svasti samastavastunicayāṁnvitavānatabhūbhridāśrayaṁ vistritavēṣṭitāvani
taḷaṁ prithusatvasamanvitaṁ nijāpāstaparabrajāvakiramujvaḷakīrttisudhāṁśusaṁbhavaṁ pra
stutavāytu vikramanripāḷakuḷāṁbudhi nityasustitaṁ . sāhasadoḷu dharādharadharaṁ bhujavī
ryyanijapratāpasaṁdōhadōḷarjja(rjju)naṁ baḷavirōdhinripāḷasamastasainikabya(byū) hamanāvagaṁ tavipa caṁḍa
parākramaneṁdaḍī raṇōcchāha jayāṁganāsaktajōmanripāḷanoḷāridirccuvaru . Uragēṁdraṁ
dhāti yaṁ dhāriṇi himagiriyaṁ hermmeśaiḷaṁ kubhi(bhṛ)jjāvaranaṁ gaurīvaraṁ caṁdrananamaḷinacaṁdraṁ
kaḷāstōmamaṁ nirbhbharadiṁdaṁ tāḷduvaṁtapratimaripukuḷōdhdhūtasāmrājya
lakṣmībharamaṁ hēḷāsusādhyaṁ tanagene taḷedaṁ vikramādityabhūpaṁ . susaṁga
daṇḍanāykara prabhāvaventendaḍe . tuṁgatarattaraṁgabahaḷābdhiparītamahī
taḷāgradoḷu saṁgaḷisirdda viprakuḷasaṁbhavaralli samastanītiśāstraṁgaḷoḷaṁ viśāradane
ṁde niraṁtaravarttilīleyiṁ piṁgade baṁṇnikuṁ dhare susaṁgananīśapadābjabhriṁganaṁ . ku
ḍiyara haṁnirddhānyada kaḍavaravidu kāmadhēnu cintāmaṇiyaṁteḍevaḻiyada beḷevo
lanī guḍigēriyideṁdu māḍidaṁ vanajabhavaṁ . dikkāminiyara kucadoḷu dikkarigaḷadha
vaḷayugaḷadantachaviyoḷu guttaṁ dharmmadakaṇiyeṁbakkaramaṁ kīrtti baredaḷī jagavaḻi ya[l .]
beḍaguvaḍe kaṇgesōbhipa guḍigēriyadhīśa kāmagāvuṁḍanoḷārppaḍi guṇagaṇānuśīḷa
de toḍarda dayāparacaritradoṁduṁnatiyoḷu . dharmmakkanukūlanappa cāviseṭṭiya prabhā
vaveṁteṁdaḍe . Iṁtu jagarjjanaṁ pogaḷe peṁpesedaggaḷa kētamallaniṁ kaṁtunibhaṁ sutaṁ hita
vaṁ kuladīpakaneṁba peṁpanāḷpaṁtogedaṁ dharāvaḷeyadoḷu manujāgraṇi cāviseṭṭi yeṁbaṁtu
ditōditakke neleyādudu nirmmaḷadharmmadēḷtaraṁ . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kumāravīravikra
mādityadēvanu susaṁgadaṁḍanāyakaruṁyalliya samastaparivāramuṁ guḍigēriya kāma
gāvuṁḍanuṁ Alliya Aṟuvattokkaluṁ mukhyavāgi śrīmūlasthānakalidēvargge jīrnnōddhā
rakkaṁ Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga nityapūje naivēdya naṁdādīvige caitrapavitravintinitumaṁ lēsāgi
Ūrjitaṁ māḍi naḍayisuvaṁtāgi caṁdramauḷipaṁḍitara kālaṁkarcci dhārapūrvvakaṁ māḍi bi
ṭṭa dattiyuṁ cāviseṭṭi kaṭṭisida keṟegaṁ biṭṭa datti sakavarṣa 1104 neya śubhakri tsaṁvatsara mārgga
śira su saurṇnami brihaspativāra sōmagrahaṇa vuttarāyaṇasaṁkramāṇa byatīpātaṁ kūḍi .
baṁda mahapuṁṇyatithiyalli śrīmūlasthānakalidēvargge biṭṭa bhūmigeggeya koḷadiṁ mū
ḍalu mattaru 6 cāviseṭṭiya keṟege biṭṭa bhūmi Ūriṁ teṁka mattaru 1 kuḍukaṁdiya
haḷḷadiṁ kiṭṭina huṇiseyiṁ paḍuvalu mattaru 2 Antu mattaru mū 3 kōṭipayiṁka
vileyanekkōṭi tapōdhanara vēdaraṁ haṁnikōṭiyanekkōṭi tīrttadi kōṭimahā dinadoḷa
ḷidaniṁtidanaḷida . śrīmatu hoṁkuṁdada sēnabōva kāvarasara maga dēvaṁṇnaṁ barada bōva
na suputraṁ sivakumāraṁ kaṁḍarisida . gāṇavenisu Anisaralusoṁṭige
yeṇne
Digital edition of SII 18.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
